title: Dolphin AI Introduces New Privacy-Focused Chatbot
summary: Dolphin AI has launched a new chatbot that prioritizes user privacy. The bot doesn't store conversation history, making it a more secure option for sensitive discussions.
body:
Dolphin AI, a company known for its privacy-focused AI tools, has introduced a new chatbot that doesn't store any conversation history. Unlike many other AI chatbots, this one ensures that your chats remain private and aren't used to train future models. This move is part of a growing trend towards privacy in AI, where users are increasingly concerned about data security.

For everyday users, this means you can have more candid and secure conversations with an AI assistant. If you've ever hesitated to discuss sensitive topics with a chatbot, this new option could give you the peace of mind you need. Think of it like having a private conversation with a friend who doesn't remember or share what you've discussed.

If you're interested in trying out this new chatbot, you can visit Dolphin AI's website and start a conversation. The bot is designed to be user-friendly, so you don't need any technical knowledge to get started. Keep an eye out for updates, as Dolphin AI plans to add more features in the coming months.
twitterThread:
💬 Want to chat with an AI without worrying about privacy? Dolphin AI just launched a chatbot that doesn’t store your conversations.

Here’s what you need to know:

1. No history is saved. Ever.

In plain English: Your chats stay private. Dolphin’s new bot doesn’t keep a record of what you talk about.

The part that matters: This is a big deal for sensitive topics.

If you’ve ever hesitated to discuss personal or sensitive information with a chatbot, this could be the solution you’ve been waiting for.

Think of it like a private conversation with a friend who doesn’t remember or share what you’ve said.

You can try it today by visiting Dolphin AI’s website. No technical skills required – just start chatting!

Keep an eye out for updates, as Dolphin AI plans to add more features soon.
standaloneTweet: 💬 Want to chat with an AI without worrying about privacy? Dolphin AI just launched a chatbot that doesn’t store your conversations. Try it today!
